analysis.reasoning: Core message: Celebrates the start of COVID-19 vaccinations across multiple EU countries, highlighting simultaneous uptake across the Union, prioritization of the vulnerable, and forthcoming sufficient doses for everyone. Evaluation: EU1 (successful story) – implied but not explicit about history or overcoming past traumas; focus is current rollout, so weak fit. EU2 (EU is united) – strong fit: references vaccinations happening "everywhere across the EU" and lists cities across member states, conveying coordinated, shared action. EU3 (useful for its citizens) – strong fit: stresses protecting the vulnerable first and ensuring enough doses for all, showcasing practical EU-level benefit to citizens during a crisis. EU4 (avant-garde) – not asserted; no claim of pioneering leadership. EU5 (global champion of fair causes) – not relevant; no rights/democracy framing. EU6 (contributes to a better world) – scope is internal, not global. Conclusion: Narratives EU2 and EU3 are promoted.
